title: funlife Privacy Rainbow Window Film, Watercolor Static Cling Window Stickers, Non-Adhesive Double-Sided Glass Film, Vintage Butterflies and Wild Flowers 43X100CM
features: [Rainbow Effect]-The stained window film creates a beautiful rainbow when natural light passes through the window.
[Non-Adhesive]-Static cling window film without glue only need to spray some water on the window when installing, and then flatten it with cards.
[Watercolor]-Watercolor effect pattern, the color effect will change in different environments and lighting.
[Pattern Design]-We have added elements from the forest to the rainbow window film, hoping to bring a new visual experience to our home.
[Privacy]-Stained window film can protect your privacy, and the distance from the window is related to the strength of privacy protection.
description: Product Description funlife Vintage Rainbow Window Film Vintage Butterflies and Wild Flowers Vintage Daisy and Mushroom funlife Privacy Rainbow Window Film Magical Visual Experience, Innovative Rainbow Window Film. We want to bring some unique joy to the dull life, and rainbow window film is like a surprise in life. When sunlight passes through the window, a beautiful rainbow will combine with the pattern to create a different effect. Product Feature Description Rainbow Effect Display The rainbow effect of the product under natural light and inside the house. The intensity and angle of natural light can produce different rainbow effects. Privacy Effect Display The product can blur the external line of sight, but it cannot fully protect privacy. The farther away you are from the window, the stronger the blurring effect of the window film.
